aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and reasonable content, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve social proof.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords for HVAC services in Chicago.
Expand website content to include detailed service pages, location-specific content, and FAQ sections.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has no Google Business Profile (GBP) reviews and lacks GBP optimization.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP or any GBP reviews significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: Missing location-specific content on the website.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP (if it exists).

nap_citations.summary: The business has a consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on the website but lacks citations on major directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
Submit the business to local and industry-specific directories.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema is missing detailed information such as address, opening hours, and geo coordinates.
Service schema is not fully utilized for each specific service offered.
Review schema is missing, which could help in showcasing customer testimonials.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Chicago who rely on reviews and local business information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing the website for local SEO.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, locally focused content and building backlinks from local and industry-relevant websites.
